[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. [Banner Stands](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands) 3. [Indoor Banner Stands](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/stands) 4. [Versatile Banner Stand with 36" x 72" Banner](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/versatile-banner-stand-36x72) 5. Versatile Banner Stand Kit # Versatile Banner Stand with 36" x 72" Banner The Versatile Banner Stand provides excellent stability, easy adjustment and is capable of holding two different banners to create a double sided display. It breaks down into a compact, flat box for easy shipping and transportation. The horizontal support bars accommodate dowels for pole pocketed banners and can hold rigid substrates up to 6 mm thick. Dowels are included. The printed banners will have a 2" pole pocket on the top and bottom. Please keep all important text and graphics at least 3" from the top and bottom. Price includes the Banner Stand and a 36" x 72" Full-Color Printed Banner. ![Versatile Banner Stand Combo 72" x 36"](https://lag.azureedge.net/product-images/bdbabefe-0290-4c7a-bd80-4a2257930733.png) Material Choice: 13 oz Vinyl for Banner Stands Banner Soft Fabric for Banner Stands - in (2) 13 oz Vinyl Banners for Banner Stands (2) Banner Soft Fabric for Banner Stands Product: with Versatile Banner Stand Hardware Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) Size (H x W): 72" x 36" 72" x 36" ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options... Unit Price for Both: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) * [Create your Product](#cust) * [Materials](#41725810-1053-479b-bdf9-93e232ed3ab0) * [Artwork](#e474a910-ed53-427f-b450-f717813d8295) * [Order Process](#9aaed4e7-5c62-4dee-b4d9-8bd0284746fd) * [Shipping](#6ce3d56a-bfd0-43dc-916c-cbbf8c3eaaaf) * [How to Install](#00b34a95-2ad4-4fbf-be47-ac6953d8d106) ## Pick a Template All Templates Automotive Stands Boat Show Stands Bridal Expo Stands Business Stands Celebration Stands Church Stands Education Stands Fitness Stands Food and Beverage Stands Holiday Stands Home and Garden Stands Job Fair Stands Misc. Stands Music Stands Political Stands Real Estate Stands Restaurant Stands Sales Stands Sports Stands Sportsman Stands Trade Show Stands Wedding Stands Template Design Template Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) ![Upload a File](https://lag.azureedge.net/banners-site-layout/ico-04.png) Upload a File Upload a File Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) Professional Designer Let Us Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) _Click on a template to customize your product_ ### Banner Stand Materials #### 13 oz Vinyl Our high quality 13 oz vinyl banner material is the standard material we use for banner stands. It is rated for both indoor and outdoor use. You can select to have either (1) 13 oz vinyl banner or (2) 13 oz vinyl banners printed for the stand. #### Banner Soft Fabric Our Banner Soft material is our fabric option for banner stands. The material offers a matte finish with vibrant print colors. The edges of the fabric will be cut with a hot knife to prevent fraying when rolled in and out of the retractor. We recommend you be very careful when retracting the banner as some fraying may still happen. You can select to have either (1) fabric banner or (2) fabric banners printed for the stand. [**Click here to request a sample packet of materials**](https://www.banners.com/sample-packet-request) [Create Your Product](#cust) ### Artwork Guidelines Vector-based.eps files with fonts converted to outlines.
